since_last: 38% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.67%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.58% · BTC -0.71% · Gold -0.58% · Nasdaq100 -0.01%. 38% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.67%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.67%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.65%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.65%, VRT +8.91%, MRVL +8.70%, SMR +7.89%, AMAT +6.74%. Laggards: SNAP -5.72%, APP -5.03%, META -4.80%, AI -4.25%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.37% at $197.01
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
